diagrams.title: Adjacency Matrix for an Undirected Graph

content.caption: A 4x4 matrix representing an undirected graph. Note the symmetry across the main diagonal (top-left to bottom-right).
Visualization of an adjacency list for vertices 0 and 1. Vertex 0 has neighbors [1, 2]. Vertex 1 has neighbors [0, 2, 3].

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350" viewBox="0 0 420 350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="9" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto">
      <path d="M 0 0 L 10 5 L 0 10 z" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.5s" begin="0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Graph Representations (Adjacency Matrix/List)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Adjacency Matrix Section -->
  <rect x="30" y="50" width="160" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Adjacency Matrix
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Matrix Grid -->
  <rect x="40" y="100" width="140" height="140" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Matrix Cells -->
  <rect x="50" y="110" width="20" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="80" y="110" width="20" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="110" y="110" width="20" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="140" y="110" width="20" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <rect x="50" y="140" width="20" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="80" y="140" width="20" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="110" y="140" width="20" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="140" y="140" width="20" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <rect x="50" y="170" width="20" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="80" y="170" width="20" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="110" y="170" width="20" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="140" y="170" width="20" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <rect x="50" y="200" width="20" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="80" y="200" width="20" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="110" y="200" width="20" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="140" y="200" width="20" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- Matrix Labels -->
  <text x="35" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="35" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="35" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="35" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <text x="60" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="90" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="120" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="150" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Adjacency List Section -->
  <rect x="230" y="50" width="160" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="75" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Adjacency List
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- List Container -->
  <rect x="240" y="100" width="140" height="140" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  
  <!-- List Items -->
  <rect x="250" y="110" width="120" height="20" fill="#64B5F6" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="123" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    A → B, D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="140" width="120" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="153" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    B → A, C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="170" width="120" height="20" fill="#1565C0" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="183" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    C → B, D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <rect x="250" y="200" width="120" height="20" fill="#2196F3" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="260" y="213" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" opacity="0">
    D → A, C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Graph Visualization -->
  <circle cx="100" y="280" r="15" fill="#64B5F6" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="100" y="283" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    A
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="160" y="250" r="15" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="160" y="253" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    B
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="220" y="280" r="15" fill="#1565C0" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="220" y="283" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    C
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <circle cx="280" y="280" r="15" fill="#2196F3" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="280" y="283" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="white" font-weight="bold" opacity="0">
    D
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Graph Edges -->
  <line x1="115" y1="280" x2="145" y2="250" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="160" y1="265" x2="205" y2="280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="220" y1="280" x2="265" y2="280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <line x1="100" y1="280" x2="280" y2="280" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  
  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="320" y="250" width="90" height="80" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="325" y="270" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Legend:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="330" y="280" width="10" height="10" fill="#64B5F6" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="345" y="289" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Edge exists
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="330" y="300" width="10" height="10" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1" rx="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="345" y="309" text-anchor="start" font-family="Arial" font-size="9" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    No edge
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
